creator: azverev@ozon.ru
text:
Hello.

What do you think about hiding PERL_64BITINT under ARCH (since it only
for i386). Also I'm not sure such construction will work:
+OPTIONS_UNSET+=3D      PERL_MALLOC cause it too late here to unset.
I think here must exist OPTIONS_CONFLICT, I started to implement it but
lack of time.
